message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
package "BileMo" {
    entity User <<E>> {
        id : int #red;#black;line:red;text:green
        email : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        firstName : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        lastName : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        password : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        plainPassword : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        roles : json #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        createdAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        updatedAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        
        getUserIdentifier() #green;#black;line:green;text:green
        eraseCredentials() #green;#black;line:green;text:green
    }

    entity Customer <<E>> {
        id : int #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        email : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        firstName : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        lastName : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        phoneNumber : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        createdAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        updatedAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
    }

    entity Account <<E>> {
        id : int #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        primaryEmail : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        name : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        industry : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        description : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        createdAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        updatedAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
    }

    entity Product <<E>> {
        id : int #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        name : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        price : float #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        description : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        brand : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        sku : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        available : boolean #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        createdAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        updatedAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
    }

    entity Category <<E>> {
        id : int #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        name : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        description : string #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        createdAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
        updatedAt : datetime #red;#black;line:red;text:black
    }

    ' Relationships for left side of diagram
    
    User --|> Account 
            note on link [1] belongs to [/linknote
            
            
   Customer --> Account  
             label "[belongs]" at end
                
                
     product -> category   
              direction down    
               arrowhead open     
                linecolor black      
                 thickness thin       
                  color red           
                   fontname sans-serif        
                    fontsize medium         
                     style bold          
                      align center        

}


@enduml
